summary: Exploratory QA covered MANUAL_RECIPE_CREATE ingredient row density, inline step composer behavior, cooking-method color visibility, narrow mobile layout, and YT_IMPORT review-row regression. No unresolved blocker or major issue remained. Claude final authority could not run because the resume session hit provider limits, so Codex completed fallback authority per user instruction.
remainingRisks: Claude final authority review could not run because the provided resume session hit provider limits; Codex completed fallback authority review per user instruction.
Real DB smoke was not run because this is a FE-only presentation and interaction change with unchanged API/DB/state transition contracts.
Actual mobile keyboard overlap remains manual-only because Playwright screenshots do not emulate device keyboard occlusion.
checks: pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/slice-18-manual-recipe-create.spec.ts --project=mobile-chrome --grep "authenticated happy path|create failure shows error and allows retry|validation: cannot save without required fields"
pnpm exec playwright test tests/e2e/slice-19-youtube-import.spec.ts --project=mobile-chrome --grep "happy path: URL|review: can add and remove ingredients|review: can remove steps"
